jobs.name: progression-sticker
jobs.prompt: Use the reference only to preserve Cagliostro's identity, hair, outfit colors and alchemist motifs. Create a new expressive super-deformed chibi sticker of Cagliostro from the waist up, smug cheerful wink, proudly presenting a tiny red alchemy potion. Granblue Fantasy Relink-inspired clean cel-shaded watercolor illustration, warm cream and gold sticker outline, large readable facial expression, clean broad color masses, crisp silhouette, no fine noisy texture. One character only, centered, generous padding. No text, no letters, no frame, no speech bubble, no watermark.
